purpose: Hacker News is a social news website focused on technology and startup content where users can submit, vote on, and discuss stories.

entities.name: story
entities.description: A news article, blog post, or other content item submitted by users

entities.name: user
entities.description: A registered member who can submit stories, vote, and comment

entities.name: comment
entities.description: User discussion and responses to stories or other comments

capabilities.name: browse_stories
capabilities.description: View and navigate through ranked lists of technology news stories

capabilities.name: filter_by_category
capabilities.description: View stories filtered by type (new, past, ask, show, jobs)

capabilities.name: search_content
capabilities.description: Search for specific stories and content using keywords

capabilities.name: submit_stories
capabilities.description: Submit new stories and content for community review

capabilities.name: user_authentication
capabilities.description: Login and manage user account and profile

capabilities.name: view_comments
capabilities.description: Read and participate in discussions about stories

screens.name: Homepage
screens.purpose: Main landing page showing ranked list of technology news stories with navigation options

frontier.rationale: Tab is visible and selected in current view, likely shows chronologically newest stories
frontier.search_strategy: Click on 'new' tab to see newest story submissions

frontier.description: Comments page or individual story discussion
frontier.rationale: Comments tab suggests dedicated discussion views, core to HN's community aspect
frontier.search_strategy: Click on 'comments' tab or individual story comment links

frontier.rationale: Ask tab suggests community Q&A section, important differentiator
frontier.search_strategy: Click on 'ask' tab to view Ask HN posts

frontier.rationale: Show tab suggests user project showcases, another key differentiator
frontier.search_strategy: Click on 'show' tab to view Show HN posts

frontier.rationale: Jobs tab indicates dedicated job board functionality
frontier.search_strategy: Click on 'jobs' tab to view job postings

frontier.rationale: Submit tab suggests story submission capability
frontier.search_strategy: Click on 'submit' tab to access submission form

frontier.rationale: Login link suggests user authentication and profile management
frontier.search_strategy: Click on 'login' link to access authentication
